response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including high-throughput microservices and real-time data handling, but lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated environments. His leadership roles are limited to smaller teams or individual contributor contexts, and his fintech-specific expertise is minimal. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not yet at the scale or depth required for this role.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed-systems expertise with real-time data processing and microservices
Proven ability to build and scale engineering teams, including DevOps and CI/CD infrastructure
Strong technical breadth with experience in multiple languages and domains, including low-latency systems
concerns: No demonstrated experience with agentic AI systems in production or fintech-specific applications
Limited leadership in high-growth scale-ups (teams were smaller than required) or regulated environments
Lack of fintech infrastructure knowledge (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, or embedded finance)
